title: Two Sum (Relay Edition)
description: Find two numbers in the array that add up to the target.
part_a_prompt: # PART A: Write a helper function 'parse_input' that takes a comma-separated string of integers and returns a list of integers.
part_b_prompt: # PART B: Use your partner's 'parse_input' to implement 'two_sum(array_str, target)'. Return the two indices.
